# neon_organization_project_transfer (Action)

Transfers projects between Neon organizations.

## Example Usage

```terraform
action "neon_organization_project_transfer" "example" {
  source_org_id      = "source-organization-id"
  destination_org_id = "destination-organization-id"
  project_ids = ["project-id-1", "project-id-2"]
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `destination_org_id` (String) The destination organization ID to transfer the projects to.
- `project_ids` (Set of String) The set of project IDs to transfer. Maximum of 400 project IDs.
- `source_org_id` (String) The source organization ID that currently owns the projects.
